1.title: Our First Date
1.caption: Flowers on the table, fries in the middle, and you across from me. I knew even then that this was going to be something special.

2.title: That Smile
2.caption: This is my favourite photo of us. Your head on mine, that little smirk of yours, and me grinning like an idiot. This is exactly what happiness looks like.

3.title: Surprised Her
3.caption: The look on your face when I showed up with sunflowers and a book — eyes shut, smiling so wide you couldn't even open them. I'd do it a hundred times over just to see this.

4.title: Elevator Moment
4.caption: A stolen mirror selfie in an elevator, bouquet still in hand. Every floor we passed felt like the world slowing down just for us.

5.title: Station Goofballs
5.caption: Standing at the railway station being absolute idiots together. I don't even remember what we were laughing about, but I remember I never wanted to get on that train.

6.title: Lazy Afternoon
6.caption: Nothing fancy — just the two of us on a quiet afternoon, curtains drawn, nowhere to be. These are the moments I hold onto the tightest.

7.title: Kiss on the Cheek
7.caption: You leaned in without warning and kissed my cheek like it was the most natural thing in the world. It kind of is, with you.

8.title: Eye to Eye
8.caption: Two pairs of eyes, two completely different people, one ridiculous amount of love. I could look at you forever and still not get enough.

9.title: Looking Into You
9.caption: Same photo, different moment. The closer we got, the more I realised — your eyes are the only place I've ever felt completely at home.

10.title: Golden Hour Us
10.caption: The sun was setting and you were making the most ridiculous pout while I was half in the frame. Still the most beautiful thing I've ever seen — you, not the sunset.

11.title: Infinity Ring
11.caption: An infinity ring against the sea at dusk. I put it on your finger at the water's edge and didn't say much, but I meant forever.

12.title: Hold Me Close
12.caption: You buried your head in my shoulder in the middle of the street and I just held on. I didn't want to let go. I still don't.

13.title: Looking at Each Other
13.caption: We were just standing there, looking at each other, and someone caught this. I'm so glad they did. This is what we look like when we're completely ourselves.

14.title: You Leaned In
14.caption: Your head resting against my chest, eyes closed, and me looking down at you like I can't quite believe you're real. I still can't, some days.

15.title: City Nights
15.caption: You spinning on a rooftop in the city lights, hair flying, laughing into the wind. I was watching you and thinking — god, she's incredible.

16.title: Both Kissing
16.caption: We both leaned in at the same time and it ended up being more of a cheek squish than anything else. Honestly, this might be my favourite one of all.

17.title: Us in Motion
17.caption: Some moments are too alive to be frozen in a photo. This one moves, just like we do — always forward, always together.
